---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Hugo Trad"
description: "Curriculum vitæ de Hugo Trad — disponible en intégralité sur demande."
lang: fr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/cv">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Langue">
  <a href="../en/cv.html">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/cv.html" class="is-active">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/cv.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="recherche.html">Recherche</a>
      <a href="projets.html">Projets</a>
      <a href="enseignement.html">Enseignement</a>
      <a href="cv.html" class="is-active">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Curriculum Vitæ</h1>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Actuellement</h2>
      <p class="cv-lead"><em>Professeur assistant en sciences comportementales</em></p>
      <p class="cv-sub">Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique · Rabat, Maroc</p>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Formation</h2>
      <p class="cv-sub cv-sub--lg">
        Doctorat et master en sciences cognitives — École normale supérieure (Institut Jean Nicod), Paris.<br>
        Double licence en biologie et philosophie — Sorbonne, Paris.
      </p>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">CV complet</h2>
      <p class="cv-sub">Disponible sur demande.</p>
      <a class="cv-request__btn" href="mailto:hugo.trad@um6p.ma?subject=Demande%20de%20CV">Demander le CV complet</a>
    </section>
  </article>
</main>
```
